translations: And not (are) equal the good (deed) and the evil (deed)
then behold One who between you and between him
(was) enmity (will become) as if he (was) a friend intimate
puzzle.hint: This verse teaches the principle of responding to negativity with a superior, positive action.
puzzle.arabic: وَلَا تَسْتَوِى ٱلْحَسَنَةُ وَلَا ٱلسَّيِّئَةُ ۚ ٱدْفَعْ بِٱلَّتِى هِىَ أَحْسَنُ فَإِذَا ٱلَّذِى بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَهُۥ عَدَٰوَةٌۭ كَأَنَّهُۥ وَلِىٌّ حَمِيمٌۭ
puzzle.verseEn: And not equal are the good deed and the bad. Repel [evil] by that [deed] which is better; and thereupon, the one whom between you and him is enmity [will become] as though he was a devoted friend.
